stemHtml: A technician, who was not responsible for fixing the broken flap, has conducted the daily inspection, repaired the flap, and signed all the necessary paperwork. What should the commander do in this situation?

options.a: Ask the technician if he/she knows if he/she was allowed to sign.
options.b: Conduct a visual inspection of the repaired flap before the flight.
options.c: Have the person who carried out the repair sign.
options.d: Assume that the technician who signed the paperwork is authorised to do so.
